name: CompTIA Certification Labs
postCreateCommand:
containerlab version && docker pull alpine:latest && docker pull ubuntu:22.04 && echo '
✅ Environment ready! Navigate to any lab directory and run: sudo containerlab deploy -t topology.clab.yml
' && echo '' && echo '🤖 Damira AI is installed! Get your free API key:' && echo '   1. Sign up at https://damiraai.com (free, no credit card)' && echo '   2. Copy your API key from the dashboard' && echo '   3. VS Code Settings → search Damira → paste key' && echo '   4. Open the Damira chat panel — your AI study buddy for these labs' && echo ''
